title: Mega's Arms
description: Forge 25+ New historical weapons with highly configurable combat mechanics, made with a unique forging minigame
body:
![Mega's Arms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b60d7c6733725454edbbf2eb410c85f6d46e26d7.png)
Mega's Arms adds 27 different historical weapons. Including Swords, Polearms, Daggers, Maces and Axes that can all be forged in the Forge crafting station with a unique forging minigame where you have to heat metal, beat it with your hammer and quench it in a bucket in a UI with physics simulation. You can make these weapons with the following materials Wood, Copper, Gold, Iron, Netherite and newly added Steel. All the weapons added in the mod have new combat mechanics such as dynamic Blocking and Parrying, Bleeding, Armor Penetration, increased attack reach and Wielding which is an attribute on two-handed weapons. Some mobs can also spawn with these weapons and extra armor to add more challenge. Almost everything in the mod is fully configurable and is designed to fit into vanilla Minecraft.

![Forging](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a2fbbff90d1630974bc659f0e5e940c38fdcc27.png)
**Crafting Stations** There are three different tiers of crafting stations, first for making wooden weapons is the Workbench, second for making Gold, Copper and Iron is the Forge, finally for making Steel and Netherite is the Nether Forge (wooden weapons don't require you to do the forging minigame but all the metal weapons do). **Smithing Hammers** Smithing Hammers are a new tool added that come in different tiers (Wood, Stone, Gold, Copper, Iron, Steel, Diamond and Netherite) and are needed for making weapons eg. a Wooden Hammer is needed for making wooden weapons and a Iron Hammer is needed for making Copper weapons (higher tiers of hammers can be used to make all the previous tiers of weapons, like the Netherite hammer can make all tiers of weapons) Smithing Hammers can also be used to mine blocks like a Pickaxe and have special interactions with some blocks eg. Cobblestone can be crushed into Gravel. **Minigame** When forging metal weapons a UI minigame is initiated where you have an ingot with physics that you can pickup and throw around. You heat the ingot in a furnace that you then pick up and move to an anvil where you have to play a timing game to hammer the ingot. As you hammer the ingot it cools down making your hammer strikes less effective, so you must pickup and reheat your ingot in the furnace. Once the ingot is fully hammered you must pick it up and quench it in a bucket of water, completing the minigame and giving you your weapon.
![Combat Mechanics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/987ca556191bbabeeb3f215669fd8b1313fd4c81.png)
**Blocking and Parrying** You can right click to block with your weapon, each weapon has a max guard stat and damage taken is reduced by the amount of guard that the weapon has. And if damage exceeds the amount of guard the weapon has then your guard breaks going on cooldown shortly. Each blocked hit will lower your guard by one (which naturally regenerates over a short time) but if you parry your guard will not be lowered. When Parrying damage is reduced by the amount of guard plus the attack damage the weapon has. **Bleeding** Bleeding is a new effect that deals damage over time (similar to the Wither effect) and causes blood particles to drip off you. Bleed is inflicted by weapons with bleed chance, bleed can be inflicted multiple times on the same entity stacking the effect amplifier and duration. Armor decreases the chance to bleed, some entities, like Undead are immune to bleed. **Wielding** Wielding is a negative attribute on two-handed weapons ranging from Wielding one to Wielding three (Wielding three being the most potent) Wielding decreases the attack damage and attack speed of the weapon when an item is in your offhand. **Armor Penetration** Armor Penetration is another attribute. It makes the weapon ignore a percentage of armor, but it does not effect armor toughness or the Protection enchantment. **Attack Reach** Most weapons have increased attack reach, which allows you to hit entities from further away.
![Additional Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ccbe8d34f9bfbb45de2f6f7d805cff521def17f.png)
**Steel** Steel is a new material that is between Iron and Diamond. It can be obtained by smelting a Steel Charge (which is made with Iron, Clay and Charcoal) in a Blast Furnace. Steel can be used to make Armor, Tools and of course weapons. **Mobs** Some mobs like Zombies, Skeletons etc. Can spawn with weapons from the mod and extra armor including Steel armor. **Dyeable Handles** Weapons with leather handles can be dyed with dyes similar to Leather armor, allowing for millions of color combinations which can be removed by clicking on a Cauldron with water in it.
![Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/869a8b207f7024ea7a64cbe2962b9a16199e73b8.png)
Cudgel
Spoiler A simple club used as a basic weapon. ![Cudgel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2967cdd97e070b001d9a3a5f96940bdf99d5633d_0.webp)

Tanto
Spoiler A fast close quarters japanese weapon with high bleed chance. ![Tanto](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6535f09034d754847a3e34e62474a63df2e9b793_0.webp)

Dagger
Spoiler A versatile close quarters weapon. ![Dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6589db2ce97c9b1dc2dd3a49e47747da6883399_0.webp)

Parrying Dagger
Spoiler A dagger designed to block and parry enemy attacks. ![Parrying Dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/380bbf215e3c46048cd71b3ac11455dea527508c_0.webp)

Rondel Dagger
Spoiler A stiff narrow dagger designed to pierce armor. ![Rondel Dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/859854e472eb41d5ced4de909b7df3b0ceed0068_0.webp)

Xiphos
Spoiler A short ancient leaf bladed sword with good damage. ![Xiphos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46a1a75b3564c2f52a7bc45ab99475c214279aa8_0.webp)

Wakizashi
Spoiler A short companion sword carried along side the Katana nimble with high bleed chance. ![Wakizashi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d211b028a759efe2caa9db3dcebcac764289f406_0.webp)

Falchion
Spoiler A slower heavy hitting curved blade built for powerful attacks with good defense. ![Falchion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68f3d8679a41e19ecc84579107bb5d23bfa66952_0.webp)

Katana
Spoiler The classic two-handed japanese sword it is highly effective. ![Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c8e3e36b4f6acb023d5c09bdbecfd31fdf3c03f_0.webp)

Arming Sword
Spoiler A effective and reliable sword very versatile. ![Arming Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e667f5edf4be16b947d80769fdc8bebd9c91da45_0.webp)

Sabre
Spoiler A curved sword designed for powerful attacks and good defense. ![Sabre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3488bcb25b84b91b2e029a1b2170e808390ded25_0.webp)

Kriegsmesser
Spoiler A large single edged sword with designed for high damage and great defense. ![Kriegsmesser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b9c22e3a7c7e351cdc13056ef86cf7e2fc43957_0.webp)

Rapier
Spoiler A slender thrusting sword designed for speed and precision. ![Rapier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d74429a089c749c9397c98a44f0c344e0e068cd_0.webp)

Longsword
Spoiler A versatile two-handed sword balanced for offense and defense. ![Longsword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f56429a27f9d0352f6570473046e925aeb653ee3_0.webp)

Nodachi
Spoiler An oversized Katana built for powerful attacks with a high bleed chance. ![Nodachi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aafcf7c3c3d6f178be49f5a1a9287a2db2fa2295_0.webp)

Zweihander
Spoiler A massive two-handed sword with highly effective defense. ![Zweihander](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f4caa1b90813ec31289b723bafe72c951ac9d96_0.webp)

Morningstar
Spoiler A short spiked mace capable of good damage and piercing armor. ![Morningstar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f94343a7fd1bbbd205d4ac314064cd1c17fe11a_0.webp)

Bearded Axe
Spoiler An versatile axe with a hooked lower blade. ![Bearded Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3437bf75a435c46a1f510156ae6b861b3dc2f3ae_0.webp)

Flanged Mace
Spoiler A heavy mace designed for high damage and armored enemies. ![Flanged Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a713ed8d21f0d6c8130968cfc3e05e798e5580e7_0.webp)

War Hammer
Spoiler A hammer designed to crush armor with high damage and armor penetration. ![War Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8db5842e22a15fe132041b64aa1c7580e6b087a9_0.webp)

Dane Axe
Spoiler A large two-handed axe with a high bleed chance. ![Dane Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c751e2aef70fd67d87d485390bbdd642a92669ca_0.webp)

Naginata
Spoiler A japanese polearm with a curved blade for powerful attacks. ![Naginata](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/442e37b8f5fa0cf5c7b2eb3ac8a12ae94b581125_0.webp)

Lucerne Hammer
Spoiler A heavy polearm with a hammer, spike and beak used for devesating armor. ![Lucerne Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ec5a833f7462e712b2e7e567b7ae78533a639f7_0.webp)

Guisarme
Spoiler A very versatile hooked polearm. ![Guisarme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec2eb906610c4915ca5419ae83fe0f924e74f3a0_0.webp)

Halberd
Spoiler A poweful polearm combining axe, spike and beak with a high bleed chance. ![Halberd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c86939295682be87f5686d837492005147fe22b_0.webp)

Yari
Spoiler A japanese spear designed for strong defense. ![Yari](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0851ef3d013d738562a5f93e7bfdd170614083c7_0.webp)

Spear
Spoiler A simple thrusting weapon with long reach and high speed. ![Spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae14d6ef6a6d91cb7f6f1938ddf75563df72a523_0.webp)

Pike
Spoiler An extremely long spear designed for keeping enemies at a distance. ![Pike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63e3de879dd5f4adbb1db24fb5be7e65dd9eb93e_0.webp)

**Configuration** Everything listed above is highly configurable. You can find the config file for configuring the forge (disabling the minigame, enabling the debug and changing the Steel Charge smelt time) at config/megasarms-forge.toml. You can find the file for configuring the custom mob equipment (disabling and changing spawn chances of custom weapons and armor for different mobs) at config/megasarms-custom_mob_equipment.toml. You can find the file for configuring general things (disabling the hammer requirment for forging, disabling Blocking, Parrying, Bleeding, Armor Penetration etc.) at serverconfig/megasarms/general.toml. You can find the file for configuring the stats of every weapon type (changing attack damage, reach, bleed etc.) at serverconfig/megasarms/weapon_customization.toml.
**Compatability** The mod is compatible with: [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) [Better Mob Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mob-combat) [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
**Credits** EJender (for design and all artwork) Complementary Unbound Shaders (for images)
